'''Vandyne''' was an industrialized [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vandyne system/Legends|Vandyne system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. As Vandyne was within the region of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] and was located in the same "corridor" of space as [[Axxila/Legends|Axxila]], it was a target for the space pirates known as [[Kavil's Corsairs]]. During the Clone Wars, the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], and so the planet became a member of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist Alliance]].

The world was [[Attack on the Vandyne system|attacked]] and conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="TEA" />
